name: _comment
value: Keel managed policies for Brave/Chromium on Linux. Install to /etc/brave/policies/managed/keel-managed-policy.json. These are enforced and cannot be overridden by the end user. Documentation: https://chromeenterprise.google/policies/ and https://github.com…

name: _keel_notes
value: {"ChromeVariations_1":"Value 1 = 'allow critical fixes only' — the variations service can still ship urgent security mitigations but not feature experiments. 0 = full block; we deliberately keep critical fixes.","component_updates":"Kept ON. These deliver …
